reviews.author: Alan Rigg
reviews.text: We LOVED our four night holiday at Hon Tam Resort. It’s the epitome of a tropical island experience for weary city dwellers like us. Staff and facilities were simply the BEST and we felt pampered all the way. The gym even has a beautiful view of the beach ! The pool was SO beautiful. Food was amazing with a myriad of choices. Can’t recommend this place highly enough. We will be back !

reviews.author: Yaping C.
reviews.text: Family trip with my parents—first time for them to try diving and snorkeling, and my first time paragliding, all in such a cost-effective way! It was an amazing experience 🤗🤗🤗

reviews.author: Krish Mobile accessories & repair shop krish
reviews.text: Hon tam is quite beautiful island which is quite near to the city Vinepearl and hon tam is almost the same port or station which is covered by the same operator we chose hon tam, I likedd the beaches and resort and lots of activities to take part in and there is accomodation place also, there is mud bath also which is quite famous there. It's totally green island and best place for kids and lots of water activities go take part in we really enjoyed a lot.i highly recommend

reviews.author: Wilson Cheung
reviews.text: Wonderful destination for mud bath Good food with stunning sea view Good services

reviews.author: Khoi McQuach
reviews.text: Considering the price, we can honestly say that the experience was far exceeded our expectations. The view from our bungalow (tropical deluxe with sea view) was spectacular. The mud bath, spa, pools, hot spring, and water sports including parasailing and jet ski were excellent. Decent selection of food and outstanding service from staff.

reviews.author: A Lin
reviews.text: Many activities to do, including soaking in the mud baths and swimming. Hygiene could've been improved a bit in some areas. Considering it as one of the tourist destinations in the island, I was kinda surprised to know that the staffs there don't speak English. Few boats in an hour so check the schedule before going is recommended.

reviews.author: Yuli Lam
reviews.text: Most cleanest and blue water with soft white sand I have seen in South Vietnam so far! The island belongs to a resort thats why you need to pay 250.000 VND entrance fee. As soon as you get there the staff will welcome you and explain you. No need to stay there overnight. I recommend to get on the island at 7 or 8 AM in the morning so that you can enjoy the beauty of the nature. Later on a bunch of tourists will land which is really exhausting. Also, due to the tourists almost the whole beach is packed with chairs and way too many beach activities, not much space to enjoy the view or even to swim properly with all the people. So important: get there on the right time!

reviews.author: CHANHYEONG LEE
reviews.text: Its very good exprience to stay in hon tam resort. Beautiful beach and swimming pool.

reviews.author: Sergey K
reviews.text: Noh Tam island is not worth visiting! :( Just three resorts and nothing else. We felt trapped with nowhere to go. There are no paths to see the island. Even the path between resorts has a gate. They want you to stay at your resort, spend all your money there on very overpriced food and go nowhere! (A glass of juice is 90k.) No small business and no competition. If you want to explore then arrange your own boat by phone. Reception will not help! The south side of the island looks interesting in pictures but there is no way to get there from the resort. Despite this the resorts are crowded but not many people are swimming due to jet skies and boat traffic. Such a shame for an island with such good nature and potential. If all you care for is the pool and don't mind hight prices, then maybe it's ok.

reviews.author: Jane Nguyen
reviews.text: The landscape is so nice and the sea is very clean. That's a reason I love this place at first sight. Bedsides the food is delicious and the service is also good too. Very satisfied with this place.

reviews.author: MerPerle Resorts & Hotels
reviews.text: MerPerle Hon Tam Resort on Hon Tam island, a must place to visit when you are in Nha Trang!

reviews.author: 曾司蕙
reviews.text: good massage in hon tam resort, nice staff, clean environment, mature technique

reviews.author: Duyen Nguyen
reviews.text: Very beautiful and friendly staff

reviews.author: Vinh Tran
reviews.text: nice, polite and caring staff clean rooms with beautiful location easy mobility inside the resort with safe, quick and friendly electric car drivers

reviews.author: Ngân Lê
reviews.text: Very great experience. Staffs are friendly and the services are good. We enjoy ourselves very much

reviews.author: Ray Z
reviews.text: I gave two stars because of the pretty environment. The missing three are due to the service. Note an interesting thing: 99% waiters or waitresses can only speak Chinese and Vietnamese.

reviews.author: Phu Nguyen (Jen)
reviews.text: Nice view but sometimes it is crowded with Chinese visitors. We took a boat to an island nearby where there is a floating restaurant far way from the noise.

reviews.author: Make Money Business
reviews.text: This place is wonderful, I like the blue sea around the island the most <3

reviews.author: Lydia Pfister
reviews.text: Thank you Xuyen (Leon) for helping us and being so friendly

reviews.author: Tâm Nguyễn Văn
reviews.text: A real resort that's worth to call a resort!

reviews.author: Dan Liu
reviews.text: I love diving here and see awesome view!

reviews.author: Tfarm
reviews.text: One of the best beaches in Vietnam.
